shadows.name: action-glow
shadows.purpose: The default shadow for primary buttons to make them lift off the page.

shadows.name: action-hover
shadows.purpose: Deeper glow when hovering primary buttons.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Used for main calls to action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background-color: #009246; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; transition: all 0.2s ease; box-shadow: 0 4px 14px 0 rgba(0, 146, 70, 0.2); border: none; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #007a3c; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px 0 rgba(0, 146, 70, 0.3); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; color: #0d0d0d; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; transition: all 0.2s ease; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { border-color: #009246; color: #009246; background-color: rgba(0, 146, 70, 0.03); }

components.name: Input Field
components.css: .ds-input-field { width: 100%; padding: 0.85rem 1.2rem; background-color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 10px; color: #0d0d0d; font-size: 1rem; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; transition: all 0.2s ease; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input-field:focus { border-color: #009246; outline: none; background-color: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(0, 146, 70, 0.1); }

narrative.overview: AVANZA combines professional authority with warm accessibility. It rejects the dense, intimidating nature of traditional government portals, replacing it with a clear, guided, and highly trustworthy experience. The design is airy, crisp, and definitively tied to Italy without falling into caricatures. It explicitly rejects generic SaaS startup templates and cluttered bureaucratic interfaces.
keyCharacteristics: Intentional use of the Italian flag colors (Green #009246, Red #ce2b37) to anchor the identity

rules.name: The Flag Anchor Rule
rules.body: Green is for progress and primary actions; Red is for premium contrast or alerts. Never mix them indiscriminately; their usage must feel deliberate and structural.

rules.name: The Legibility First Rule
rules.body: All body text must sit at a high contrast ratio. Never use light gray for body copy; the user is reading complex immigration information and needs perfect clarity.

rules.name: The Intentional Lift Rule
rules.body: Shadows are only used to indicate interactivity or current state (like a selected card or a primary button). Structural containers remain flat.

dos: Do use Italian Green (#009246) for the primary path forward.
Do ensure all body text has strong contrast against its background.
Do emphasize human elements (like founder avatars) to build trust.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS startup templates that feel disconnected from human services.
Don't create cluttered, bureaucratic interfaces that increase cognitive load.
Don't use gradient text or side-stripe borders as decorative accents.
Don't animate images on hover (e.g. no scale or rotate on images).
